privileged_info_summary: Task uses three synthetically-generated furniture objects (Table, Chair, Bookshelf) created procedurally via Blender Python in the setup phase. The furniture library is saved to /home/ga/BlenderProjects/furniture_library.blend. The agent must append these objects to an empty room and save results to /home/ga/BlenderProjects/assembled_room.blend and /home/ga/BlenderProjects/assembled_room.png. Minimum object separation is 0.5 meters. All data is synthetic with no external sources.
